summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 Visa Option Wizards. All 3 wizards (AgentFinderWizard, DIYVisaWizard, AssistedServiceWizard) are working correctly. Fixed a bug in DIYVisaWizard where the dynamic document API call was missing the 'purpose' field.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with search bar
Search for 'Japan' shows dropdown and scrolls to VISA INTELLIGENCE section
3 Visa Option cards appear (Express eVisa, Self Apply, Assisted)
Express eVisa card has 'Find Agents' button with data-testid='express-evisa-btn'
Clicking 'Find Agents' opens AgentFinderWizard
AgentFinderWizard shows 'Find & Compare Verified Agents' header
AgentFinderWizard displays 5 verified agents with filters
AgentFinderWizard has 5 steps: Compare Agents, Share Details, Agent Connect, Application Help, Submission & Tracking
AgentFinderWizard closes via X button
Self Apply card has 'Apply Now' button with data-testid='self-apply-btn'
Clicking 'Apply Now' opens DIYVisaWizard
DIYVisaWizard shows 'DIY Application Guide' header
DIYVisaWizard has 5 steps: Check Requirements, Document Checklist, Form Guidance, Book Appointment, Track Application
DIYVisaWizard Step 2 shows loading state for dynamic documents
DIYVisaWizard loads document checklist (Passport, Photographs, etc.)
DIYVisaWizard closes via X button
Assisted card has 'Get Assistance' button with data-testid='assisted-btn'
Clicking 'Get Assistance' opens AssistedServiceWizard
AssistedServiceWizard shows 'Assisted Application Service' header
AssistedServiceWizard has 5 steps: Share Details, Document Review, Application Help, Book Appointment, Submission & Tracking
AssistedServiceWizard shows form with 11 input fields
AssistedServiceWizard shows Pricing Breakdown sidebar
AssistedServiceWizard navigation works (Continue/Back buttons)
AssistedServiceWizard shows Done button on last step
AssistedServiceWizard closes via Done button

bugs_fixed.issue: Dynamic document API call was missing 'purpose' field causing 422 error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'purpose: formData.purposeOfTravel' to the API request body

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 wizard components properly integrated into Seasons.js
Each wizard has proper state management (showAgentFinder, showDIYWizard, showAssistedService)
All buttons have correct data-testid attributes for testing
Wizards receive country, visaType, and pricing props from parent component
All 3 wizards have 5 steps with proper navigation
DIYVisaWizard now correctly fetches dynamic documents from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Visa Option wizards verified working. AgentFinderWizard triggered by 'Find Agents' button (data-testid='express-evisa-btn'), DIYVisaWizard triggered by 'Apply Now' button (data-testid='self-apply-btn'), AssistedServiceWizard triggered by 'Get Assistance' button (data-testid='assisted-btn'). Fixed DIYVisaWizard API call to include 'purpose' field for dynamic document fetching.
